ios.name: TOWER: Isometric Defense
ios.subtitle: PvE Tower Defense Idle Game
ios.description:
TOWER is an always-active isometric tower defense game. Your tower is under constant siege — defend it with lasers, mortars, tesla coils, freeze rays, and nukes. Upgrade, survive, and push your wave record.

Features:
• 6 unique enemy types including bosses
• 5 devastasting turret types
• Beautiful retro-tech isometric visuals
• Always active — your defenses run while you're away
• Deep upgrade system: turrets, shield, economy
• Infinite waves with scaling difficulty
• Boss waves every 10 levels
• Procedural audio — no music files needed
• Built for iOS and Android

screenshots.note: Generate from browser: open game at 390x844, screenshot, scale to required sizes
